label_matrix.phase3_12_reuse_policy: The adj_close, CSI300 common-calendar, complete-horizon, 20D return, excess, max-upside, max-drawdown, and preserved-missingness math may be referenced; Phase 3.12 identity h1h5-historical-sealed-v1 is never overwritten or silently aliased.
label_matrix.alias_policy: exact canonical IDs only; duplicate legacy aliases in one dataset are forbidden

benchmark_cache.note: raw CSI300.csv ends 2024-10-31; adjusted aliases extend to 2026-06-24 and require deterministic alias selection

unavailable_or_unsafe: historical ST/suspension/delisting state with complete provenance
true turnover without dated shares outstanding

walk_forward_contract.fold_dates: not_frozen_in_phase4_1; must be selected only from verified local PIT coverage before Phase4.3
walk_forward_contract.purge_rule: training labels must end strictly before each test as_of_date; purge up to maximum 20-trading-day label overlap
walk_forward_contract.minimum_feature_history_rule: row valid only when every challenger-required lookback is complete; global maximum registry lookback currently 252 bars

symbol_state_policy.delisted: retain historical row only with reliable PIT state; otherwise flag unavailable and exclude from claims
symbol_state_policy.suspended: preserve row with tradability/missing-bar status; do not forward-fill feature evidence across missing bars
symbol_state_policy.st: use only reliably dated state; current snapshot cannot be treated as historical truth
symbol_state_policy.missing_data: preserve missingness and quality reason; no silent zero imputation unless a challenger preregisters training-only imputation

examples: production score plus independent risk filter
ranking model if dependencies and data support it
challenger_hierarchy.implementation_phase: after matrix and chronological validation frozen
